halalStatus.description: Halal certification status. MANDATORY for all food and beverage products. Strongly recommended for cosmetics and pharmaceuticals. HALAL: MUI-certified halal. halalCertNumber required. HALAL_PENDING: certification in process. halalCertNumber optional. NON_HALAL: explicitly non-halal (e.g. pork products). NOT_APPLICABLE: non-food product where halal is not relevant.
halalStatus.x-ion-regulatory: UU 33/2014 tentang Jaminan Produk Halal; PP 39/2021

halalCertNumber.description: MUI (Majelis Ulama Indonesia) halal certificate number. Format varies by certification period.

bpomRegNumber.description: BPOM registration number for food, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals. BPOM_MD: domestic product (e.g. MD-123456789012). BPOM_ML: imported product (e.g. ML-123456789012).

sniCertNumber.description: SNI (Standar Nasional Indonesia) compliance certificate number. Required for products with mandatory SNI (electronics, PPE, toys).
sniCertNumber.x-ion-regulatory: PP 34/2018 tentang Sistem Standardisasi dan Penilaian Kesesuaian Nasional

spPIRTNumber.description: SP-P-IRT small-scale home food production license. For UMKM food sellers without full BPOM registration.

ageRestricted.description: Whether this product requires age verification at point of purchase. True for tobacco, alcohol, adult content, and certain pharmaceuticals.
ageRestricted.x-ion-regulatory: PP 109/2012 tentang Pengamanan Bahan yang Mengandung Zat Adiktif

minAge.description: Minimum purchaser age in years when ageRestricted is true. Indonesia: 18 for tobacco and alcohol, 21 for certain substances.
